findings: Term 'Agent Pulse' absent from README; uses 'monitor pane', 'live progress', 'stampede-monitor.sh' instead.
Progress bar format documented (README:232) matches monitor implementation (stampede-monitor.sh:115).
README:136 claims 'real-time nested progress summaries' — verified by stampede-monitor.sh:143-193 reading swarm-state.json.
stampede status documented as skill command (AGENTS.md:48, SKILL.md:36,113); stampede-monitor.sh is separate shell tool — distinction not made clear in README.
Stuck detection threshold (120s, stampede-monitor.sh:200-216) undocumented in README — reasonable understatement.
No specific update frequency documented; 'real time' language (README:46,118,136) is imprecise but not inaccurate for a polling loop.
stampede-monitor.sh entry in README:86 matches actual file location and described purpose.
